title: erysimum lanceolatum subsp. ochroleucum
intro: Erysimum lanceolatum subsp. ochroleucum, also known as the Creamy Wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and lance-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Erysimum lanceolatum subsp. ochroleucum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
